rationale: Cycle 3: Fix 3 HIGH bugs — BUG-005 transient MerlinGaugeSystem (made build_default_gauges static), BUG-007 encapsulation violation in ADD_REPUTATION (routed through effects.apply_effects), BUG-008 null ref in _reset_ai_for_new_run (added property guard). All 3 bugs fixed, reviewed for Bible v2.4 compliance.
next_cycle_plan: Fix MEDIUM bugs (BUG-014 faction defaults 0 vs 20, BUG-011 deterministic minigame). Then TEST-PLAYTEST-1 + TEST-AUDIT-1.
